senses.definition: (of people or animals) weighing much more than what is thought to be healthy for their body

examples.x: He admires body diversity and believes everyone should be accepted regardless of being fat or thin.
She is proud of her curves and doesn't let anyone make her feel bad about being fat.
The doctor advised him to exercise regularly to avoid becoming overweight or fat.
The rude kids teased him for being fat, which made him feel insecure.

senses.definition: weighing more than what is considered healthy or desirable for one's body size and build

examples.x: John is overweight because he eats large portions and rarely exercises.
The doctor advised Mary to cut down on sugary snacks to help her avoid becoming overweight.
Being overweight increases the risk of developing heart disease and diabetes.
Sarah's cat is overweight because she feeds it too many treats.
Many people struggle with losing weight once they become overweight due to unhealthy eating habits.

senses.definition: extremely overweight, with excess body fat that significantly increases health risks

examples.x: Due to his sedentary lifestyle and poor diet, Tom has become obese.
Obese patients often face discrimination in healthcare settings.
The study focused on the dietary habits of obese individuals.
The clinic offers specialized programs for obese patients aiming to promote weight loss.
Obese children are at a higher risk of developing chronic diseases later in life.

senses.definition: (of women or their body part) having a full or generously proportioned figure

examples.x: The ample curves of the actress caught the attention of many admirers.
She embraced her ample figure, feeling confident and beautiful in her own skin.
The ample bosom of the model was accentuated by the low-cut dress she wore.
Despite societal pressure to be thin, she celebrated her ample body with pride.
Her ample proportions made her the ideal candidate for plus-size modeling.

senses.definition: (particularly of a child or young adult) slightly overweight in a way that is considered cute or charming rather than unhealthy or unattractive

examples.x: She loved to cuddle her chubby cat, feeling its soft fur beneath her fingers.
Despite his chubby appearance, he was active and enjoyed outdoor activities with his family.

senses.definition: (of a person) short and fat

examples.x: The tubby man struggled to fit into the narrow seat on the bus.
The tubby toddler toddled around the playground with chubby cheeks and a happy smile.
Despite being young, he was already tubby, with a round belly that protruded over his belt.
The tubby puppy waddled across the yard, its pudgy tail wagging excitedly.
The tubby cat enjoyed lounging in the sun, its round body sprawled lazily on the windowsill.

senses.definition: (of a person) slightly fat and heavy

examples.x: The stout man lumbered down the street, his heavyset figure moving with determination.
Despite his best efforts to lose weight, he remained stout and struggled to fit into his clothes.
The stout man struggled to squeeze through the narrow doorway, his large belly grazing the frame.
She waddled down the street, her stout figure swaying from side to side with each step.
The stout woman huffed and puffed as she climbed the stairs, her heavyset frame slowing her progress.

senses.definition: solidly built with a thick or muscular body shape

examples.x: The chunky football player easily pushed through the opposing team's defense.
He wore loose-fitting clothes to conceal his chunky physique.
The chunky baby waddled across the room, chubby cheeks flushed with excitement.
His chunky fingers deftly maneuvered the intricate pieces of the puzzle.
The chunky actor was cast in roles that required a physically imposing presence.

senses.definition: excessively overweight or obese

examples.x: The king's corpulent figure filled the grand throne.
Despite his corpulent appearance, he moved with surprising agility.
She struggled to find fashionable clothes that would fit her corpulent frame.
His corpulent stature made it difficult for him to navigate through crowded spaces.
The fashion industry has been criticized for not adequately representing people of all body types, especially those who are corpulent.

senses.definition: having a short, plump, and unattractive figure

examples.x: The dumpy man struggled to keep up with his friends on the hiking trail.
Despite her dumpy appearance, she had a kind and cheerful demeanor.
The dumpy woman felt self-conscious about her figure in the form-fitting dress.
His dumpy frame made it difficult for him to find clothes that fit well.
The dumpy dog waddled happily beside its owner, tail wagging.

senses.definition: having a body that is chubby with soft-looking flesh

examples.x: She admired her fleshy figure in the mirror, appreciating her curves.
Despite her slender frame, she had fleshy arms and thighs.
The fleshy baby had chubby cheeks and dimpled knees.
Despite his age, the boxer maintained his fleshy muscles through rigorous training.
Her fleshy cheeks flushed with embarrassment when she realized her mistake.

senses.definition: (of a person) having a  pleasantly rounded and slightly full-bodied appearance

examples.x: She had a plump face with rosy cheeks that gave her a youthful appearance.
Despite her petite stature, she had a plump figure, with curves that spoke of good health and vitality.
The actress gained weight for the role, appearing plump and round-faced to portray the character accurately.
Despite her advancing years, she remained plump and cheerful, with a zest for life that was infectious.
Despite her best efforts to diet, she remained plump and curvaceous, embracing her natural body shape.

senses.definition: (of a person) having a large body size

examples.x: Despite being teased for being a bit porky in high school, Sarah embraced her body and learned to love herself.
The comedy skit featured a porky actor wearing a fat suit for comedic effect.
He joked that he couldn't fit into his jeans anymore because he had become a bit porky over the holidays.
Instead of feeling self-conscious about being porky, he decided to join a gym and focus on improving his health.

senses.definition: (especially of a man) round or a little overweight

examples.x: The portly gentleman greeted guests with a warm smile and a hearty laugh.
Despite his portly appearance, he moved with surprising agility on the dance floor.
The portly mayor addressed the crowd with authority and confidence.
His portly figure made it difficult to find suits that fit properly.
The portly chef delighted patrons with his hearty meals and jovial personality.

senses.definition: (of a person or animal) having a round bulging stomach
slightly fat or chubby, especially in a cute or endearing way

examples.x: She tried to hide her pudgy fingers during the piano recital.

senses.definition: being short and fat
having a rounded and fat body shape

examples.x: The rotund man's cheerful demeanor matched his plump physique.
Despite his rotund appearance, he moved with surprising agility and grace.
The rotund baby giggled as he wobbled across the room on chubby legs.

senses.definition: a casual or insulting term used to refer to someone who is overweight

examples.x: He apologized for calling his friend a fatty during their argument.
It's important to avoid using terms like fatty to describe people.

senses.definition: an individual with a round physique

examples.x: He called himself a fatso after eating the whole pizza.
The kids at school sometimes teased him, calling him a fatso, which hurt his feelings.
She laughed off the nickname fatso, but deep down, it bothered her.
After gaining some weight, he jokingly referred to himself as a fatso.
The comedian made a joke about being a fatso, but the audience didn’t know how to react.

senses.definition: (of people or animals) weighing less than what is thought to be healthy for their body

examples.x: He is thin but strong, thanks to regular exercise and a balanced diet.
He was thin as a child but has since grown into a healthier weight.
She enjoys her fast metabolism, which keeps her naturally thin.
She is naturally thin and doesn't need to worry about gaining weight.
She is proud of her slender figure and takes good care of her health to remain thin.

senses.definition: having a very low amount of body fat
weighing less than the desired, healthy, or normal amount

examples.x: Despite eating regularly, he remained underweight, struggling to gain pounds.
The underweight child was put on a special diet to help him gain weight.
Many fashion models face pressure to maintain an underweight appearance to fit industry standards.

senses.definition: (of a person) excessively thin as a result of a disease, worry or hunger

examples.x: After weeks of sickness, his face looked gaunt and pale.
She became gaunt after months of strict dieting and over-exercising.
His gaunt appearance worried his friends, who urged him to seek medical attention.

senses.definition: thin and bony in a way that is not pleasant

examples.x: Despite his appetite, he remained scrawny, unable to put on weight.
The scrawny stray cat begged for food outside the cafe.
The scrawny boy was often teased by his classmates for his frail appearance.
She wore oversized clothes to hide her scrawny arms and legs.
The scrawny dog whimpered as it searched for scraps of food in the alley.

senses.definition: extremely thin and weak, often because of illness or a severe lack of food

examples.x: The refugees were found in an emaciated state after weeks without food or water.
The emaciated stray dog sought shelter under the abandoned building.
After months of chemotherapy, she emerged from treatment looking emaciated but hopeful.
The emaciated horse was rescued from neglect and given proper care.
The emaciated man's sunken eyes betrayed the depth of his suffering.

senses.definition: involving or suffering from anorexia
extremely thin to the point where the outlines of one's bones are visible beneath one's  skin
very thin or pale in a way that is suggestive of an illness

examples.x: The patient's cadaverous appearance alarmed the doctors, indicating severe malnutrition.
After weeks of fever, he emerged from his sickbed looking pale and cadaverous.
The actor underwent a drastic weight loss regimen to portray the cadaverous character accurately.
The homeless man's cadaverous face revealed years of hardship and struggle.
The ghost in the movie was depicted as a cadaverous figure, with sunken eyes and hollow cheeks.

senses.definition: extremely emaciated, particularly due to illness, lack of food, or exposure to cold
small and weak in strength or size

examples.x: The puny sapling struggled to grow amidst the towering trees of the forest.
The puny mouse scurried across the kitchen floor, seeking refuge from the cat.
Despite his puny stature, he stood up to the bully with courage and determination.
The puny kitten barely made a sound as it mewed for attention.
The puny plant struggled to grow in the shadow of the towering trees.

senses.definition: thin, bony, or skinny in an unattractive or unhealthy way
resembling a skeleton in appearance due to being very thin or emaciated
having a slender shape, often used to describe someone who is thin and wiry

examples.x: The marathon runner's stringy arms and legs were evidence of his intense training regimen.
Despite his stringy physique, he was surprisingly strong and agile.
The dancer's stringy muscles allowed her to perform intricate moves with ease.
His stringy fingers moved deftly across the piano keys, producing beautiful melodies.

senses.definition: thin in an attractive way

examples.x: He followed a healthy diet to stay slim and healthy.
She has a slim and graceful posture.
She has a slim figure and always looks elegant in her outfits.
The slim dancer moved with grace and precision.
The slim model walked confidently on the runway.

senses.definition: (of a person or body part) attractively thin

examples.x: She had a slender figure, with long limbs and a graceful posture.
The model walked down the runway with a slender frame, captivating the audience with her elegance.
His fingers were slender and nimble, perfect for playing the piano.
The young deer had slender legs that carried it gracefully through the forest.
Her slender fingers delicately traced the contours of the sculpture, admiring its intricate details.

senses.definition: (of a person or animal) thin and fit in a way that looks healthy, often with well-defined muscles and minimal body fat

examples.x: The athlete had a lean physique, with sculpted muscles and low body fat.
Despite his age, he maintained a lean and healthy appearance through regular exercise.
The lean dog ran effortlessly alongside its owner during their morning jog.
Eating a balanced diet helped her stay lean and energetic.
The boxer trained hard to achieve a lean and powerful body for the upcoming match.

senses.definition: physically thin, fit, and attractive

examples.x: Despite his busy schedule, he made time for daily workouts to stay trim.

senses.definition: (of a woman) small in an attractive way

examples.x: She had a petite frame, with delicate features and slender limbs.
Despite her petite stature, she exuded confidence and grace wherever she went.
His petite girlfriend stood on tiptoe to kiss him goodbye, her small frame fitting perfectly into his arms.
The model's petite build made her a natural fit for runway shows featuring high-fashion designs.
Despite her advancing years, she maintained a petite figure through regular exercise and healthy eating habits.

senses.definition: pleasantly small and attractive, often implying a sense of elegance

examples.x: The dainty woman captivated everyone with her small, attractive frame and charming smile.
The dainty necklace added a touch of elegance to her outfit.
His dainty hands moved swiftly and skillfully as he crafted intricate jewelry.

senses.definition: having a lean and strong body

examples.x: The wiry gymnast executed intricate routines with grace and precision, showcasing his strength and flexibility.
Despite his wiry frame, he possessed surprising power and endurance on the hiking trail.
Her wiry build allowed her to slip through tight spaces with ease during the obstacle course.
The wiry boxer relied on speed and agility rather than brute force to outmaneuver his opponents in the ring.
His wiry muscles rippled beneath his skin as he effortlessly climbed the steep rock face.

senses.definition: having a lean and muscular physique, characterized by strength and agility
thin or lean, often implying that the person is not carrying excess weight

examples.x: After months of training, he had a spare physique, ideal for competitive running.
The model's spare figure was highlighted in the latest fashion magazine.
She preferred a spare style in her wardrobe, focusing on minimalistic and fitted clothing.
The old man’s spare frame made him appear even more fragile.
The actor’s spare appearance suited the role of a struggling artist in the film.

senses.definition: small and attractive in shape, structure, or appearance

examples.x: The delicate ballerina moved across the stage with grace and precision, captivating the audience with her elegant movements.
She had delicate features, with porcelain skin and soft, doe-like eyes that gave her an ethereal beauty.
Despite her delicate appearance, she possessed inner strength and resilience that helped her overcome life's challenges.
He had delicate hands, nimble and skilled in the art of surgery, capable of performing intricate procedures with precision.
The delicate flower girl walked down the aisle, scattering rose petals with each step, adding a touch of sweetness to the wedding ceremony.

senses.definition: small, delicate, and charming physical presence, often with a slightly mischievous quality
delicately thin and with an agile body
(of a woman) elegant and slender in built

examples.x: The svelte actress captivated audiences with her elegant appearance on the red carpet.
Despite her age, she maintained a svelte figure through yoga and healthy eating.
The svelte dancer moved with grace and precision across the stage.
He admired her svelte silhouette as she walked confidently down the street.
Despite his busy schedule, he made time for regular exercise to stay svelte and fit.

senses.definition: (of a person) having a body size that is noticeably larger than usual

examples.x: The basketball player was big, towering over everyone else on the court.
The bodybuilder was big, with muscles that seemed to bulge out of his shirt.
The wrestler was big, using his size to his advantage in the ring.
The big man had to duck to avoid hitting his head on the doorframe.
The big man was known for his strength and endurance.
